allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='vw_EncompassLoan_Silver' ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='vw_EncompassLoan_Silver' AND \(COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%processor%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%uwlog%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%uw_log%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%folder%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%uwstatus%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%uw%status%'\) ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='vw_EncompassLoan_Silver' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%log%' ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE '%UW%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%uw%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%nderwrit%' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT DISTINCT TOP 30 uw_currentstatus FROM vw_EncompassLoan_Silver WHERE uw_currentstatus IS NOT NULL ORDER BY uw_currentstatus")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT DISTINCT TOP 30 currentloanfolder FROM vw_EncompassLoan_Silver WHERE currentloanfolder IS NOT NULL ORDER BY currentloanfolder")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='vw_EncompassLoan_Silver' AND \(COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%status%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%milestone%'\) ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT TOP 5 loan_number, uw_currentstatus, milestone_status, loanstatus_current, current_milestone, est_closing_date, estimatedclosing_date FROM vw_EncompassLoan_Silver WHERE currentloanfolder='My Pipeline' AND uw_currentstatus IN \('To Be Assigned','In Review','Assigned','Submitted for Final Approval'\)")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT TOP 10 loan_number, uw_currentstatus, currentstatus_date, underwriting_date, underwritinginitialreview_date, underwritingsubmission_date FROM vw_EncompassLoan_Silver WHERE currentloanfolder='My Pipeline' AND uw_currentstatus IN \('To Be Assigned','In Review','Assigned','Submitted for Final Approval'\)")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "AMB-SQL\\\\AMBSQL" -d SAM_Reporting -E -h -1 -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT encompass_loan_number, [CX.UW.STATUS], [CX.UW.LOGSTATUS] FROM Encompass.dbo.reports_data WHERE [CX.UW.LOGSTATUS] IS NOT NULL")
